title: Lower-limb MI dataset for knee pain patients from Zuo et al. 2025
description: This dataset comprises lower-limb motor imagery EEG recordings from 30 knee pain patients across 5 sessions, with 500 trials total (250 per class) of left and right leg imagery tasks. Recorded at 500 Hz using a 30-channel ZhenTec EEG system with standard 10-05 montage, the dataset supports brain-computer interface development and motor rehabilitation applications in clinical populations. Multiple classification approaches including CSP+LDA, FBCSP+SVM, EEGNet, and Riemannian geometry methods have been evaluated on this dataset.
methods_description: EEG data were acquired using a ZhenTec EEG system with 30 channels arranged in standard 10-05 montage (reference: CPz, ground: FPz) at 500 Hz sampling rate. Participants performed cue-based motor imagery of left and right leg flexion/extension in 5 sessions of 100 trials each (50 trials per class per session), with 4-second trial duration and visual stimulus presentation. No feedback was provided during the offline paradigm.
